post.description: Canonical authentication endpoint for product/API clients using JSON payloads.
Compatibility endpoint for OAuth2 Password Flow tooling (for example Swagger Authorize). Use canonical `POST /aris3/auth/login` for product/client integrations.
Deprecated compatibility alias; use canonical `PATCH /aris3/auth/change-password`.

get.description: Computes effective permissions for the authenticated request context.
Self-context permission catalog resolved from authenticated context. Lists permission keys available for role templates, overlays, and user overrides.
Admin permission catalog for role templates, tenant/store overlays, and user overrides.

Administrative/internal access-control endpoint: tenant/store/user scope is resolved from JWT/context unless explicit path/query/body parameters override it.

Permission hierarchy: 1) Role Template, 2) Tenant/Store overlays (allow/deny), 3) User overrides, 4) Effective permissions.

get.description:
Administrative/internal access-control endpoint for effective permission resolution for a target user.

- Scope defaults to JWT/context when not explicitly provided.
- Permission hierarchy: 1) Role Template, 2) Tenant/Store overlays (allow/deny), 3) User overrides, 4) Effective permissions.
- Response includes canonical `subject`, resolved `permissions`, `denies_applied`, `sources_trace`, and `trace_id`.

post.description:
Creates a store under an explicit tenant scope.

- **Canonical input**: send `tenant_id` in the JSON body.
- **backward compatibility**: deprecated `query_tenant_id` is accepted as legacy alias and must match body `tenant_id` when both are provided.
- **Admin rule**: `SUPERADMIN` and `PLATFORM_ADMIN` must provide an explicit tenant (no implicit fallback).

post.description:
Dispatches one admin action over a user.

- `action=set_status`: requires `status`.
- `action=set_role`: requires `role`.
- `action=reset_password`: optional `temporary_password`; if omitted, server generates one.
- `transaction_id` is required for idempotency/audit correlation.

Canonical values are uppercase (`ACTIVE`, `SUSPENDED`, `CANCELED`).

lines.title: Lines
lines.description: Transfer lines. Supports EPC/RFID and SKU/PENDING lines.

line_type.title: Line Type
line_type.description: Transfer line type. Use EPC for RFID-tagged items and SKU for quantity-based pending stock.

lines.title: Lines
lines.description: Replacement transfer lines for draft update. Supports EPC/RFID and SKU/PENDING lines.

action.title: Action
action.description: Action to execute. `set_status` uses `status`, `set_role` uses `role`, and `reset_password` optionally uses `temporary_password`.

status.title: Status
status.description: Required only when `action=set_status`. Canonical values are uppercase (`ACTIVE`, `SUSPENDED`, `CANCELED`).

temporary_password.title: Temporary Password
temporary_password.description: Optional only when `action=reset_password`. If omitted, server generates a temporary password.

transaction_id.title: Transaction Id
transaction_id.description: Required for all actions to correlate idempotency and audit events.

role.title: Role
role.description: Resolved user role as persisted in runtime.

status.title: Status
status.description: Canonical lifecycle status (`ACTIVE`, `SUSPENDED`, `CANCELED`). Canonical values are uppercase (`ACTIVE`, `SUSPENDED`, `CANCELED`).

is_active.title: Is Active
is_active.description: Backward-compatible derived flag. `ACTIVE` maps to `true`; `SUSPENDED`/`CANCELED` map to `false`.

dry_run.title: Dry Run
dry_run.description: If true, computes exact counts but does not delete data.

dry_run.description: Echoes request mode: true for preview-only dry run, false for destructive execution.

deleted_counts.description: Returned for real purge executions with actual deletion counts.

preserve_audit_events.description: Echoes whether audit history was preserved.

VariantFieldSettingsPatchRequest.title: VariantFieldSettingsPatchRequest
VariantFieldSettingsPatchRequest.description: Partial update payload. Omitted fields remain unchanged.

code.description: Machine-readable error code. Canonical vocabulary for new clients: `INVALID_TOKEN`, `PERMISSION_DENIED`, `RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND`, `CONFLICT`, `VALIDATION_ERROR`. OpenAPI examples and shared schemas use canonical values for consistency. Compatibility aliases may still appear in legacy/public POS responses (`UNAUTHORIZED`, `FORBIDDEN`, `NOT_FOUND`, `BUSINESS_CONFLICT`).

OAuth2PasswordBearer.description: Paste JWT bearer token obtained from `/aris3/auth/login` or `/aris3/auth/token`.

UnauthorizedError.description: Unauthorized. Returned when the bearer token is missing, invalid, or expired.

ForbiddenError.description: Forbidden. Returned when the token is valid but lacks required permissions.

tags.name: Admin Tenants
tags.description: Tenant lifecycle administration (list, create, update, delete, status actions).

tags.name: Admin Stores
tags.description: Store administration endpoints, including tenant-scoped creation and lifecycle actions.

tags.name: Admin Users
tags.description: User administration endpoints (CRUD plus operational actions such as status/role/password updates).

tags.name: Admin Access Control
tags.description: Administrative access-control management (role templates, tenant/store overlays, user overrides). Scope is resolved from JWT/context when not explicit.

tags.name: Access Control (Self)
tags.description: Self-service access-control read endpoints resolved from the authenticated request context.

tags.name: pos-sales
tags.description: Point-of-sale sales issuance, listing, detail, and action workflows.

tags.name: pos-returns
tags.description: Point-of-sale return eligibility, quote, creation, and return action workflows.

tags.name: pos-cash
tags.description: Point-of-sale cash sessions, movements, reconciliation, day close, and cash cut workflows.

tags.name: pos-drawer
tags.description: Point-of-sale drawer events and lifecycle endpoints.

tags.name: pos-advances
tags.description: Point-of-sale customer advances issuance, lookup, alerts, detail, and action workflows.

tags.name: transfers
tags.description: Inventory transfer create/list/detail and action workflows.

tags.name: exports
tags.description: Report export generation and download endpoints.
